statement: The system shall stop within a tenth of a second when the emergency stop button is pressed.
The system shall allow execution of predefined arm movements via selectable files or a button press.
The system shall include Bolt Runner constraints to prevent cross‑threading when tightening bolts, regardless of orientation.
The system shall have zero perceptible latency; any delay greater than one millisecond shall be flagged and cause operation to halt.
The system shall break long movements into incremental stages so operators can monitor progress.
The system shall support extensive simulation and testing of design changes to validate failure‑point mitigations.
The system shall provide high-definition camera feeds with sufficient resolution for clear operator view.
The system shall support up to eight camera streams and allow the operator to select primary views, such as two main, wrist, and external cameras.
The system shall prioritize frame rate over resolution when bandwidth is limited to maintain a smooth view.
The system shall allow simultaneous viewing of the same video feeds by up to five operators.
The system shall display a ghost overlay of the planned path to indicate where the machine will move.
The system shall enable definition of no‑go zones with visual warnings, audible alarms, and haptic force‑feedback to prevent entry.
The system shall include LED illumination on the end‑effector to cast shadows that aid depth perception.
The system shall calculate and enforce force limits for heavy payload handling to prevent operator strain and equipment overload.
